speaker: WOLSEY
text: Whilst our commission from Rome is read,

speaker: WOLSEY
text: Let silence be commanded.

speaker: KING
text: What’s the need?

speaker: KING
text: It hath already publicly been read,

speaker: KING
text: And on all sides th’ authority allowed.

speaker: KING
text: You may then spare that time.

speaker: WOLSEY
text: Be ’t so. Proceed.

speaker: SCRIBE
text: Say “Henry King of England, come into the

speaker: SCRIBE
text: court.”

speaker: CRIER
text: Henry King of England, come into the court.

speaker: KING
text: Here.

speaker: SCRIBE
text: Say “Katherine Queen of England, come into

speaker: SCRIBE
text: the court.”

speaker: CRIER
text: Katherine Queen of England, come into the

speaker: CRIER
text: court.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Sir, I desire you do me right and justice,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: And to bestow your pity on me; for

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: I am a most poor woman and a stranger,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Born out of your dominions, having here

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: No judge indifferent nor no more assurance

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Of equal friendship and proceeding. Alas, sir,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: In what have I offended you? What cause

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Hath my behavior given to your displeasure

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: That thus you should proceed to put me off

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: And take your good grace from me? Heaven witness

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: I have been to you a true and humble wife,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: At all times to your will conformable,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Ever in fear to kindle your dislike,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Yea, subject to your countenance, glad or sorry

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: As I saw it inclined. When was the hour

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: I ever contradicted your desire,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Or made it not mine too? Or which of your friends

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Have I not strove to love, although I knew

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: He were mine enemy? What friend of mine

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: That had to him derived your anger did I

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Continue in my liking? Nay, gave notice

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: He was from thence discharged? Sir, call to mind

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: That I have been your wife in this obedience

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Upward of twenty years, and have been blessed

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: With many children by you. If, in the course

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: And process of this time, you can report,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: And prove it too, against mine honor aught,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: My bond to wedlock or my love and duty

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Against your sacred person, in God’s name

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Turn me away and let the foul’st contempt

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Shut door upon me, and so give me up

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: To the sharp’st kind of justice. Please you, sir,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: The King your father was reputed for

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: A prince most prudent, of an excellent

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: And unmatched wit and judgment. Ferdinand,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: My father, King of Spain, was reckoned one

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: The wisest prince that there had reigned by many

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: A year before. It is not to be questioned

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: That they had gathered a wise council to them

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Of every realm, that did debate this business,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Who deemed our marriage lawful. Wherefore I humbly

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Beseech you, sir, to spare me till I may

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Be by my friends in Spain advised, whose counsel

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: I will implore. If not, i’ th’ name of God,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Your pleasure be fulfilled.

speaker: WOLSEY
text: You have here, lady,

speaker: WOLSEY
text: And of your choice, these reverend fathers, men

speaker: WOLSEY
text: Of singular integrity and learning,

speaker: WOLSEY
text: Yea, the elect o’ th’ land, who are assembled

speaker: WOLSEY
text: To plead your cause. It shall be therefore bootless

speaker: WOLSEY
text: That longer you desire the court, as well

speaker: WOLSEY
text: For your own quiet as to rectify

speaker: WOLSEY
text: What is unsettled in the King.

speaker: CAMPEIUS
text: His Grace

speaker: CAMPEIUS
text: Hath spoken well and justly. Therefore, madam,

speaker: CAMPEIUS
text: It’s fit this royal session do proceed

speaker: CAMPEIUS
text: And that without delay their arguments

speaker: CAMPEIUS
text: Be now produced and heard.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Lord Cardinal,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: To you I speak.

speaker: WOLSEY
text: Your pleasure, madam.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Sir,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: I am about to weep; but thinking that

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: We are a queen, or long have dreamed so, certain

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: The daughter of a king, my drops of tears

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: I’ll turn to sparks of fire.

speaker: WOLSEY
text: Be patient yet.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: I will, when you are humble; nay, before,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Or God will punish me. I do believe,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Induced by potent circumstances, that

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: You are mine enemy, and make my challenge

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: You shall not be my judge; for it is you

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Have blown this coal betwixt my lord and me—

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Which God’s dew quench! Therefore I say again,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: I utterly abhor, yea, from my soul

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Refuse you for my judge, whom, yet once more,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: I hold my most malicious foe and think not

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: At all a friend to truth.

speaker: WOLSEY
text: I do profess

speaker: WOLSEY
text: You speak not like yourself, who ever yet

speaker: WOLSEY
text: Have stood to charity and displayed th’ effects

speaker: WOLSEY
text: Of disposition gentle and of wisdom

speaker: WOLSEY
text: O’ertopping woman’s power. Madam, you do me wrong.

speaker: WOLSEY
text: I have no spleen against you, nor injustice

speaker: WOLSEY
text: For you or any. How far I have proceeded,

speaker: WOLSEY
text: Or how far further shall, is warranted

speaker: WOLSEY
text: By a commission from the Consistory,

speaker: WOLSEY
text: Yea, the whole Consistory of Rome. You charge me

speaker: WOLSEY
text: That I “have blown this coal.” I do deny it.

speaker: WOLSEY
text: The King is present. If it be known to him

speaker: WOLSEY
text: That I gainsay my deed, how may he wound,

speaker: WOLSEY
text: And worthily, my falsehood, yea, as much

speaker: WOLSEY
text: As you have done my truth. If he know

speaker: WOLSEY
text: That I am free of your report, he knows

speaker: WOLSEY
text: I am not of your wrong. Therefore in him

speaker: WOLSEY
text: It lies to cure me, and the cure is to

speaker: WOLSEY
text: Remove these thoughts from you, the which before

speaker: WOLSEY
text: His Highness shall speak in, I do beseech

speaker: WOLSEY
text: You, gracious madam, to unthink your speaking

speaker: WOLSEY
text: And to say so no more.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: My lord, my lord,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: I am a simple woman, much too weak

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: T’ oppose your cunning. You’re meek and humble-mouthed;

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: You sign your place and calling, in full seeming,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: With meekness and humility, but your heart

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Is crammed with arrogancy, spleen, and pride.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: You have by fortune and his Highness’ favors

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Gone slightly o’er low steps, and now are mounted

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Where powers are your retainers, and your words,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Domestics to you, serve your will as ’t please

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Yourself pronounce their office. I must tell you,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: You tender more your person’s honor than

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Your high profession spiritual, that again

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: I do refuse you for my judge, and here,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Before you all, appeal unto the Pope

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: To bring my whole cause ’fore his Holiness,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: And to be judged by him.

speaker: CAMPEIUS
text: The Queen is obstinate,

speaker: CAMPEIUS
text: Stubborn to justice, apt to accuse it, and

speaker: CAMPEIUS
text: Disdainful to be tried by ’t. ’Tis not well.

speaker: CAMPEIUS
text: She’s going away.

speaker: KING
text: Call her again.

speaker: CRIER
text: Katherine, Queen of England, come into the

speaker: CRIER
text: court.

GENTLEMAN
               
              USHER
text: Madam, you are called back.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: What need you note it? Pray you, keep your way.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: When you are called, return. Now, the Lord help!

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: They vex me past my patience. Pray you, pass on.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: I will not tarry; no, nor ever more

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: Upon this business my appearance make

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              KATHERINE
text: In any of their courts.

speaker: KING
text: Go thy ways, Kate.

speaker: KING
text: That man i’ th’ world who shall report he has

speaker: KING
text: A better wife, let him in naught be trusted,

speaker: KING
text: For speaking false in that. Thou art, alone—

speaker: KING
text: If thy rare qualities, sweet gentleness,

speaker: KING
text: Thy meekness saintlike, wifelike government,

speaker: KING
text: Obeying in commanding, and thy parts

speaker: KING
text: Sovereign and pious else, could speak thee out—

speaker: KING
text: The queen of earthly queens. She’s noble born,

speaker: KING
text: And like her true nobility she has

speaker: KING
text: Carried herself towards me.

speaker: WOLSEY
text: Most gracious sir,

speaker: WOLSEY
text: In humblest manner I require your Highness

speaker: WOLSEY
text: That it shall please you to declare in hearing

speaker: WOLSEY
text: Of all these ears—for where I am robbed and bound,

speaker: WOLSEY
text: There must I be unloosed, although not there

speaker: WOLSEY
text: At once and fully satisfied—whether ever I

speaker: WOLSEY
text: Did broach this business to your Highness, or

speaker: WOLSEY
text: Laid any scruple in your way which might

speaker: WOLSEY
text: Induce you to the question on ’t, or ever

speaker: WOLSEY
text: Have to you, but with thanks to God for such

speaker: WOLSEY
text: A royal lady, spake one the least word that might

speaker: WOLSEY
text: Be to the prejudice of her present state,

speaker: WOLSEY
text: Or touch of her good person?

speaker: KING
text: My Lord Cardinal,

speaker: KING
text: I do excuse you; yea, upon mine honor,

speaker: KING
text: I free you from ’t. You are not to be taught

speaker: KING
text: That you have many enemies that know not

speaker: KING
text: Why they are so but, like to village curs,

speaker: KING
text: Bark when their fellows do. By some of these

speaker: KING
text: The Queen is put in anger. You’re excused.

speaker: KING
text: But will you be more justified? You ever

speaker: KING
text: Have wished the sleeping of this business, never desired

speaker: KING
text: It to be stirred, but oft have hindered, oft,

speaker: KING
text: The passages made toward it. On my honor

speaker: KING
text: I speak my good Lord Cardinal to this point

speaker: KING
text: And thus far clear him. Now, what moved me to ’t,

speaker: KING
text: I will be bold with time and your attention.

speaker: KING
text: Then mark th’ inducement. Thus it came; give heed to ’t:

speaker: KING
text: My conscience first received a tenderness,

speaker: KING
text: Scruple, and prick on certain speeches uttered

speaker: KING
text: By th’ Bishop of Bayonne, then French ambassador,

speaker: KING
text: Who had been hither sent on the debating

speaker: KING
text: A marriage ’twixt the Duke of Orleans and

speaker: KING
text: Our daughter Mary. I’ th’ progress of this business,

speaker: KING
text: Ere a determinate resolution, he,

speaker: KING
text: I mean the Bishop, did require a respite

speaker: KING
text: Wherein he might the King his lord advertise

speaker: KING
text: Whether our daughter were legitimate,

speaker: KING
text: Respecting this our marriage with the dowager,

speaker: KING
text: Sometime our brother’s wife. This respite shook

speaker: KING
text: The bosom of my conscience, entered me,

speaker: KING
text: Yea, with a spitting power, and made to tremble

speaker: KING
text: The region of my breast; which forced such way

speaker: KING
text: That many mazed considerings did throng

speaker: KING
text: And pressed in with this caution. First, methought

speaker: KING
text: I stood not in the smile of heaven, who had

speaker: KING
text: Commanded nature that my lady’s womb,

speaker: KING
text: If it conceived a male child by me, should

speaker: KING
text: Do no more offices of life to ’t than

speaker: KING
text: The grave does to th’ dead, for her male issue

speaker: KING
text: Or died where they were made, or shortly after

speaker: KING
text: This world had aired them. Hence I took a thought

speaker: KING
text: This was a judgment on me, that my kingdom,

speaker: KING
text: Well worthy the best heir o’ th’ world, should not

speaker: KING
text: Be gladded in ’t by me. Then follows that

speaker: KING
text: I weighed the danger which my realms stood in

speaker: KING
text: By this my issue’s fail, and that gave to me

speaker: KING
text: Many a groaning throe. Thus hulling in

speaker: KING
text: The wild sea of my conscience, I did steer

speaker: KING
text: Toward this remedy whereupon we are

speaker: KING
text: Now present here together. That’s to say,

speaker: KING
text: I meant to rectify my conscience, which

speaker: KING
text: I then did feel full sick, and yet not well,

speaker: KING
text: By all the reverend fathers of the land

speaker: KING
text: And doctors learnèd. First, I began in private

speaker: KING
text: With you, my Lord of Lincoln. You remember

speaker: KING
text: How under my oppression I did reek

speaker: KING
text: When I first moved you.

speaker: LINCOLN
text: Very well, my liege.

speaker: KING
text: I have spoke long. Be pleased yourself to say

speaker: KING
text: How far you satisfied me.

speaker: LINCOLN
text: So please your Highness,

speaker: LINCOLN
text: The question did at first so stagger me,

speaker: LINCOLN
text: Bearing a state of mighty moment in ’t

speaker: LINCOLN
text: And consequence of dread, that I committed

speaker: LINCOLN
text: The daring’st counsel which I had to doubt,

speaker: LINCOLN
text: And did entreat your Highness to this course

speaker: LINCOLN
text: Which you are running here.

speaker: KING
text: I then moved you,

speaker: KING
text: My Lord of Canterbury, and got your leave

speaker: KING
text: To make this present summons. Unsolicited

speaker: KING
text: I left no reverend person in this court,

speaker: KING
text: But by particular consent proceeded

speaker: KING
text: Under your hands and seals. Therefore go on,

speaker: KING
text: For no dislike i’ th’ world against the person

speaker: KING
text: Of the good queen, but the sharp thorny points

speaker: KING
text: Of my allegèd reasons drives this forward.

speaker: KING
text: Prove but our marriage lawful, by my life

speaker: KING
text: And kingly dignity, we are contented

speaker: KING
text: To wear our mortal state to come with her,

speaker: KING
text: Katherine our queen, before the primest creature

speaker: KING
text: That’s paragoned o’ th’ world.

speaker: CAMPEIUS
text: So please your Highness,

speaker: CAMPEIUS
text: The Queen being absent, ’tis a needful fitness

speaker: CAMPEIUS
text: That we adjourn this court till further day.

speaker: CAMPEIUS
text: Meanwhile must be an earnest motion

speaker: CAMPEIUS
text: Made to the Queen to call back her appeal

speaker: CAMPEIUS
text: She intends unto his Holiness.

speaker: KING
text: I may perceive

speaker: KING
text: These cardinals trifle with me. I abhor

speaker: KING
text: This dilatory sloth and tricks of Rome.

speaker: KING
text: My learnèd and well-belovèd servant Cranmer,

speaker: KING
text: Prithee return. With thy approach, I know,

speaker: KING
text: My comfort comes along.—Break up the court.

speaker: KING
text: I say, set on.
